tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend — pick endpoint + relax GetNight
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add POST /groups/{groupId}/nights/{nightId}/pick that sets the picker (is_credited derived from role) and returns the night DTO now carrying pickerId; relax GetNight so a finalized night is reloadable.

**Files:** backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql, backend/internal/db/nights.sql.go (regen), backend/nights.go, backend/main.go, backend/nights_test.go, backend/nights_integration_test.go

**Verify:** cd backend && just check && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestNightAttendanceIntegration$' ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql", "backend/internal/db/nights.sql.go", "backend/nights.go", "backend/main.go", "backend/nights_test.go", "backend/nights_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestNightAttendanceIntegration$' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["core picker 200 + credited", "guest picker uncredited", "non-attendee 422, malformed 400, unknown night 404", "pickerId null/uuid in DTO"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend — cross-session resume + correction
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make a finalized night the resumable 'current' one (relax GetCurrentNight), preserve create idempotency via a new GetOpenNight, and prove re-pick/correction + start-next-night.

**Files:** backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql, backend/internal/db/nights.sql.go (regen), backend/nights.go, backend/nights_integration_test.go

**Verify:** cd backend && just check && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestNightAttendanceIntegration$' ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql", "backend/internal/db/nights.sql.go", "backend/nights.go", "backend/nights_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestNightAttendanceIntegration$' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["current returns finalized night; 404 only when empty", "re-pick re-attributes standings", "start-next creates new open night", "idempotency preserved", "InsertPick gone from tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend — retire standalone POST /picks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the redundant insert-with-picker path so there is a single create path.

**Files:** delete backend/picks.go, picks_test.go, picks_integration_test.go, internal/db/query/picks.sql, internal/db/picks.sql.go; modify backend/main.go.

**Verify:** cd backend && grep -rn 'InsertPick' . ; just check && go test -tags=integration ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/picks.go", "backend/picks_test.go", "backend/picks_integration_test.go", "backend/internal/db/query/picks.sql", "backend/internal/db/picks.sql.go", "backend/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && grep -rn 'InsertPick' . ; just check && go test -tags=integration ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /picks route removed", "InsertPick absent", "check + integration pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Mobile — lib/nights pickerId + recordNightPick
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend the framework-free night client with pickerId and the record call, fully tested. Additive — lib/picks stays until Task 6.

**Files:** mobile/lib/nights.ts, mobile/lib/nights.test.ts, mobile/lib/nights.integration.test.ts

**Verify:** cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nights.test.ts lib/nights.integration.test.ts && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/nights.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.test.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.integration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nights.test.ts lib/nights.integration.test.ts && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pickerId string|null parsed/validated", "recordNightPick path/method/body + throw", "just check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Mobile — record/correct pick on night screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Let the night screen record a pick by tapping an attendee, badge the recorded picker, allow correcting, and offer 'Start a new night' once finalized.

**Files:** mobile/app/night.tsx

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/night.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tap core/guest records", "recorded badge + correction refreshes order", "Start a new night when finalized", "just check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Mobile — retire lib/picks; read-only turn screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the standalone record-pick client and turn app/index.tsx into read-only all-time standings.

**Files:** modify mobile/app/index.tsx; delete mobile/lib/picks.ts, picks.test.ts, picks.integration.test.ts

**Verify:** cd mobile && grep -rn 'lib/picks\|recordPick' app lib ; just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/index.tsx", "mobile/lib/picks.ts", "mobile/lib/picks.test.ts", "mobile/lib/picks.integration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && grep -rn 'lib/picks\\|recordPick' app lib ; just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no recordPick in index.tsx; rows read-only; links kept", "lib/picks.* deleted; no picks refs", "just check passes"]}
```
